name: InsightsStateStore
description: One logical owner-only raw-SQLite generation store for retained analytical evidence and module metadata.
schema_def: Root: one insights.db inside an owner-only generation directory selected by CURRENT.
Tables: store_metadata, report_snapshot, report_payload, restatement_link, deletion_event, insights_idempotency_record, recovery_receipt, restore_event.
Metadata: PRAGMA user_version with immutable ordered migrations, active generation fingerprint, and compatibility evidence for policy versions cited by retained reports.
Settings: foreign_keys=ON, journal_mode=WAL, synchronous=FULL, bounded busy_timeout.
Write boundary: BEGIN IMMEDIATE for Retain, changed Restate, Delete, idempotency, recovery receipts, restore events, and migration metadata.
Protection: directories 0700; database, WAL, SHM, CURRENT, lock, backup, manifest, and recognized candidate artifacts 0600 where supported.

Never persisted: dated actual members, raw merchant text, canonical transaction payload, producer cursor, private corpus row, PolicyValidationReceipt, arbitrary formula, report list payload, or upstream state replica.
